channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Lush to launch The Super Mario Galaxy Movie product line March 10th, 2026 - GoNintendo
item.description:
1. Lush to launch The Super Mario Galaxy Movie product line March 10th, 2026  GoNintendo
  2. We’re not sure who the market is, but Nintendo tapped Lush to produce a series of Mario Galaxy Movie bath products  Gaming Age
  3. Lush Launches ‘The Super Mario Galaxy Movie’ Cosmetics Collection  Licensing International
  4. Old Spice and The Super Mario Galaxy Movie Launch Cosmic Grooming Collection With New Out-of-This-World Scents  Procter & Gamble
  5. Lush Cosmetics Line Around The Super Mario Galaxy Movie Launching March 10  Gamers Heroes

item.title: Google just made Gemini for Home much faster - Android Police
item.description:
1. Google just made Gemini for Home much faster  Android Police
  2. Gemini Expands to Live Camera Feeds: What It Means for Your Privacy  CNET
  3. Google Home voice commands should be ‘snappier’ with fewer errors in new update  9to5Google
  4. Google drops Gemini for Home updates: Here are 3 you should know  Mashable
  5. Google Home's latest feature is Gemini-powered 'Live Search' for cameras  Engadget

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Z Roll 5G: The 12.4-Inch Motorized Screen That Eliminates the Crease - Geeky Gadgets

  3. Samsung's Sliding Phone Revealed: No Crease Design  Gadget Hacks
  4. Samsung showed the future at MWC: A display that stretches like an accordion  Samsung Magazine
  5. Samsung Unveils New Smartphone Concept  Zamin.uz
